expo.name: The Academy - Youth Sports
expo.description: Youth athletic training in Gallatin, TN. Basketball, SAQ, multi-sport development. Schedule sessions, track progress, chat with coaches.

infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: The Academy uses your camera to take photos and videos for chat messages and to update your profile picture.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: The Academy accesses your photo library so you can share photos and videos in chat and set your profile picture.
infoPlist.NSCalendarsUsageDescription: The Academy adds your upcoming training sessions to your calendar with reminder alerts so you never miss a workout.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: The Academy uses your microphone to record video with audio for chat messages.
